queries.question: Return waste disposal methods and recycling programs in alphabetical order
queries.sql: SELECT wm.method_name, rp.program_name FROM Waste_Disposal_Method wm JOIN Construction_Site c ON wm.id =c.waste_disposal_method_id JOIN Recycling_Program rp ON rp.id =c.Recycling_Program_id ORDER BY wm.method_name, rp.program_name ASC
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?method_name ?program_name WHERE {
  ?wm a :Waste_Disposal_Method .
  ?c a :Construction_Site .
  ?c p:hasWaste_Disposal_Method ?wm .
  ?rp a :Recycling_Program .
  ?c p:hasRecycling_Program ?rp .
  ?wm p:method_name ?method_name .
  ?rp p:program_name ?program_name .
  ?wm p:method_name ?method_name_o .
  ?rp p:program_name ?program_name_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?method_name_o) ASC(?program_name_o)

queries.question: Return waste disposal methods in alphabetical order
queries.sql: SELECT method_name FROM Waste_Disposal_Method ORDER BY method_name ASC
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?method_name WHERE {
  ?waste_disposal_method a :Waste_Disposal_Method .
  ?waste_disposal_method p:method_name ?method_name .
  ?waste_disposal_method p:method_name ?method_name_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?method_name_o)

queries.question: Return waste management types in alphabetical order
queries.sql: SELECT program_name FROM Recycling_Program ORDER BY program_name ASC
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?program_name WHERE {
  ?recycling_program a :Recycling_Program .
  ?recycling_program p:program_name ?program_name .
  ?recycling_program p:program_name ?program_name_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?program_name_o)

queries.question: What happens to waste in New York?
queries.sql: SELECT  wm.method_name  FROM Waste_Disposal_Method wm JOIN Construction_Site c ON wm.id =c.waste_disposal_method_id  WHERE c.location = 'New York City'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?method_name WHERE {
  ?wm a :Waste_Disposal_Method .
  ?c a :Construction_Site .
  ?c p:hasWaste_Disposal_Method ?wm .
  ?wm p:method_name ?method_name .
  ?c p:location ?location_f .
  FILTER(?location_f = "New York City")
}

queries.question: What happens to waste in New York?
queries.sql: SELECT  wm.program_name  FROM Recycling_Program wm JOIN Construction_Site c ON wm.id =c.Recycling_Program_id  WHERE c.location = 'New York City'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?program_name WHERE {
  ?wm a :Recycling_Program .
  ?c a :Construction_Site .
  ?c p:hasRecycling_Program ?wm .
  ?wm p:program_name ?program_name .
  ?c p:location ?location_f .
  FILTER(?location_f = "New York City")
}
